rationale: Section 26.1115 references exemptions under Section 11.13 without hardcoding any dollar amount. Its formula-based calculations automatically incorporate whatever exemption amount is in effect, so increasing the homestead exemption requires no amendment here.
quote: If an individual receives one or more exemptions under Section 11.13 for a portion of a tax year as provided by Section 11.42(f), except as provided by Subsection (b) of this section, the amount of tax due on the property for that year is calculated by:
_note: No dollar amount is embedded in §26.1115; the provision operates by formula and automatically adjusts to the exemption amount set in §11.13(b).
